scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend run test && npm --prefix frontend run test:unit -- --run
scripts.test:e2e: npm --prefix backend run test:e2e && npm --prefix frontend run test:e2e
scripts.format: npm --prefix backend run format && npm --prefix frontend run format
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
